title: Smartbones 9 Mini Chicken Wrapped Sticks Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats
features: The chicken wrapped chewy sticks contain an outer layer of tasty vegetables with chicken inside wrapped in crispy chicken; the ideal snack for small dogs
Chewing fun with vegetables in the outer layer which is free from rawhide
The recipe of the chewing sticks is wheat-free, extra low in fat and easy to digest
As your dog chews, the abrasive effect naturally cleans their teeth and helps keep them healthy
The chicken sticks are also vitamin and mineral enriched / Scope of delivery: 1 bag of Wrapped Sticks Mini (9 pieces)
description: Product Description Made for fussier chewers, Smartbones Chicken Wrapped Sticks are packed full of delicious chicken with wholesome vegetables, wrapped in chicken breast for a scrumptious taste that dogs can't resist. These meaty chews have a soft and chewy core that's gentle on teeth and gums and they're made from a rawhide-free recipe so they're highly digestible too. Chicken wrapped sticks are enriched with vitamins and minerals and they're extra low in fat. Smartbones are the tasty chewing snack that dogs can’t resist, made with easy to digest alternatives to rawhide. Chewing is a natural instinct for your dog, and its a way to keep their teeth and gums healthy. With Smartbones, your dog can satisfy their chewing instincts, without the rawhide. Smiles all round. Indications Small breed dogs, Chicken-friendly Ingredients "chicken breast (41%), wheat flour, maize starch, glycerol, minerals, pea powder (3.6%), fructose, gelatine, maize syrup, sweet potato powder (1.1%), dried cultured whey, chicken liver (0.25%), carrot powder (0.1%), cheese powder. protein 25%, fat content 1%, crude fibre 1%, crude ash 6%, moisture content 14%. (/kg), Vitamins: vitamin E: 90IU. Trace elements: manganese (manganous sulphate - monohydrate): 15mg." Directions Feed 1 chew per day (max. 10% of your dog’s daily calorie intake). Select a chew slightly larger than your pet’s mouth. Box Contains SmartBones Chicken Wrapped Mini Sticks 9 Pieces See more
